title: Hexagonal Architecture & Domain-Driven Design
concepts: Domain logic must never depend on infrastructure
Ports define contracts; adapters implement them
Branded/nominal ID types prevent primitive obsession
Money as Value Object (cents + currency, safe arithmetic)
Feature flags gate new behavior without branching
CLI follows manual-page convention with documented subcommands
Date/time always stored as UTC with explicit timezone conversion
Domain models are the source of truth, not the database schema
context: Extracted from ordostudio — a production codebase using hexagonal architecture with DDD, branded IDs, Money value objects, and strict port/adapter separation. Domain logic is isolated from infrastructure via port interfaces. All IDs are nominal types (branded) to prevent cross-entity confusion. Money is always represented in cents with explicit currency to avoid floating-point arithmetic errors.
